evals.name: async-data-fetching

assertions.description: user, orders, recommendations, notifications fetched in parallel via Promise.all or similar
Promises started before they're needed, awaited only when result is required
Analytics tracking moved to after() or similar non-blocking post-response mechanism
Cache check moved BEFORE database queries, or recommends LRU/cross-request caching strategy
Mentions React.cache() or request-level deduplication for repeated calls

evals.name: bundle-loading

assertions.description: PDFExporter and/or AIAssistant loaded via next/dynamic or lazy import since they're not always needed
Third-party scripts (analytics, chat widget) deferred with strategy='lazyOnload' or loaded after hydration
AIAssistant conditionally loaded only when feature flag is active
Flags the barrel import from @/components/ui — recommends importing directly from each component file
Suggests preloading PDFExporter on hover/focus of the Export button for perceived speed

evals.name: state-rendering

assertions.description: filteredUsers derived during render instead of useEffect+setState
useMemo removed from greeting (string template) and count (simple .length)
DEFAULT_STYLE moved outside the component to avoid new object each render
useState(window.innerWidth) changed to useState(() => window.innerWidth) for SSR safety
Resize listener has cleanup (removeEventListener) added
isAdmin not subscribed to full user object — or flags that it's unused/should come from context
Dependencies use primitive values where possible
isAdmin && <AdminPanel> changed to ternary (isAdmin ? <AdminPanel> : null)
setSortDirection uses functional form (already correct — should not break it)

evals.name: rsc-server

assertions.description: Flags that cookies() makes the entire route dynamic — suggests moving to a layout or isolating
Sequential fetches (products, categories, userPrefs) should be parallelized
Flags that too much data (categories, userPrefs) is passed to the client component — only needed data should cross the boundary
categories passed to both Sidebar and ProductList — flags duplicate serialization
createOrder server action has no authentication check — flags missing auth
Suggests wrapping slow-loading sections in Suspense boundaries for progressive streaming

evals.name: perf-micro

assertions.description: mousePos tracked via useRef instead of useState to avoid re-renders on every mousemove
Chained filter/map/filter/sort combined into fewer passes or single loop
sort()[0] for finding maxEvent replaced with a loop or reduce for O(n)
emailRegex hoisted outside the component (created once, not every render)
uniqueTypes uses Set instead of filter+indexOf for O(n) vs O(n²)
typeBreakdown builds a Map/index instead of filtering events array repeatedly
localStorage read cached or moved to state/ref instead of reading every render
StaticHeader with constant props hoisted outside or memoized to avoid re-creation
Suggests content-visibility: auto for long event list that may be off-screen

evals.name: gotchas

assertions.description: Flags the comment 'runs like componentDidMount' as wrong — useEffect runs AFTER paint, not before
Flags hasUnread and bellColor as unnecessary useMemo — simple boolean/ternary expressions don't need memoization
Flags flushSync as unnecessary — React 18+ auto-batches state updates including in async functions
Flags cookies() in layout — makes ALL child pages dynamic, explains the blast radius
Suggests useTransition for the refresh loading state instead of manual loading boolean
Suggests storing fetchUser in a ref or using useLatest to avoid stale closure issues with userId
Flags theme flash — localStorage read in useEffect causes flash of wrong theme, suggests inline script or suppressHydrationWarning
